framingZh: 构图跟着这个瞬间走，让同一个瞬间里的动作和现场先成立。
framingEn: close-up of hand holding the pajama top, with the tag clearly visible against the fabric
mustShowZh: 手心朝上，托着那件浅色睡衣
翻到外面的白色洗涤标签特写
mustShowEn: hand palm-up holding a light-colored cotton pajama top
close-up of the white care label flipped outward and visible on the fabric
texture of the cotton pajama material
mayShowZh: 衣柜内其他叠放衣物的模糊背景
一小缕头发或红色发夹的影子
mayShowEn: edge of an open wardrobe door
blurred background of other folded clothes inside the wardrobe
shadow of a strand of hair or the small red hairclip
mustAvoidZh: 时尚大片般的打光和姿势
将睡衣拍得像商品展示
mustAvoidEn: presenting the pajama like a product display
detached aesthetic scenery unrelated to the moment
atmosphereZh: 像顺手留下的一段真实生活
altTextZh: 月见璃音发现睡衣标签翻出来了。
